evidence_summary: A1C Labs LLC is the legal entity and assignee for patents related to the CELLg8 technology. CELLg8 is a registered trademark and brand for a proprietary liposomal delivery system developed by Dr. Emek Blair. Patent filings (e.g., US Patent 11,690,809) explicitly list A1C Labs LLC as the assignee and CELLg8 as the associated technology/trademark. Both entities share the same principal (Dr. Emek Blair) and location (Wellington, CO). In this context, CELLg8 operates as a brand or business unit under the corporate umbrella of A1C Labs LLC.
